blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 35".
